summary: Frontend UI testing completed successfully. All core features are working: login, dashboard overview with stats, tests list with filters, single test detail page with performance metrics, history page with export, and analytics page.

issues: Console warnings about DialogTitle and aria-describedby - accessibility improvement needed for screen readers

action_items: Consider adding DialogTitle and aria-describedby to login/auth modals for better accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: All dashboard components use React Query for data fetching - proper caching and state management
Test detail page correctly transforms webMetrics to performanceMetrics for display
Filters on Tests and History pages work correctly with Zustand store
Export CSV functionality implemented in History page
seed_data_creation: 6 test records exist from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend fully tested. All pages work: Dashboard (shows stats), Tests list (with filters), Test Detail (shows FCP, LCP, CLS metrics), History (with search, filters, export), Analytics (time range selector, export). Login modal has minor accessibility warnings but functions correctly.
